profile.headline: Data Analyst | Skilled in Excel, Power BI, SQL | Data Visualization, Data Cleaning, EDA | Pursuing Computer Engineering
profile.about: Data Analyst with strong skills in Excel, Power BI, and SQL. Experienced in data cleaning, exploratory data analysis (EDA), and building clear, impactful data visualizations to support decision-making. Currently pursuing a degree in Computer Engineering, with a focus on applying analytical thinking and technical skills to real-world data problems.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology - BTech, Business Administration and Management, General
education.institution: Ahmedabad Institute Of Technology Gota, Ahmedabad (SFI) 701

recent_activity_projects.title: Sales & Profit Analysis Dashboard using Microsoft Excel
recent_activity_projects.description: Included building a structured and efficient data model, working with measures (Total Sales, Total Profit, Growth Percentage), and performing dynamic calculations.

recent_activity_projects.title: Sales Analysis Excel Dashboard Project
recent_activity_projects.description: An interactive dashboard providing key business metrics including KPI cards for Total Sales, Profit, and Quantity, along with top-performing item identification.
